label: Preview & Compliance
description: Order preview grid and pre-trade compliance checks with pass/fail badges before submission.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: complianceLoading Spinner shown during async compliance check.

0.7.note: idle state shows informational message; complianceUnavailable shows amber warning.

0.8.note: orderState=error renders errorMessage with XCircle + Retry button.

l0.notes: All 9 L0 checks pass. State machine (idle→preview→submitting→success/error) is complete.

1.1.note: All data via useBookTradeData() — no inline fetch.

1.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(); org/client/strategy shown in preview summary from scope-synced state.

1.3.note: orgId from scope shown in preview summary.

1.4.note: clientId from scope shown in preview summary.

1.5.note: strategyId from scope shown in preview summary (when not 'manual').

1.6.note: Empty scope leaves org/client/strategy summary fields empty — correct behavior.

1.7.note: No reference data in this widget — pure display of context-derived values.

l1.notes: Data flow is clean. Context correctly reads global scope and cascades into preview summary.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea.

3.1.note: In batch mode: preview/submission should be disabled (no live order submission). idle state is appropriate starting point.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(). Compliance check uses mode-appropriate strategy_id.

3.3.note: Human must verify Confirm Buy/Sell button is disabled in batch mode.

3.4.note: Human must verify batch mode indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: preview/compliance should work. handleSubmit routes to paper execution. No blocking issue.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or polling — compliance check is a one-shot REST call on preview trigger.

4.1.note: Edit button calls setOrderState('idle'). Confirm button calls handleSubmit. Retry button calls setOrderState('preview'). All handlers wired — no empty onClick.

4.3.note: Human must verify all order summary fields appear correctly for each category and mode.

4.4.note: Human must verify confirm button triggers submission and success/error states update correctly.

4.6.note: canExecute derived from useAuth() in context — not re-computed on render.

4.8.note: Human must verify compliance check list scrolls within widget bounds at minH=3.

5.1.note: Serves all strategies. Compliance checks run for execute mode (any strategy). Record-only skips compliance. DeFi execute mode shows compliance checks. OTC execute mode shows compliance checks.

l5.notes: Universal preview/compliance widget. Human execution flow 5.2-5.6 deferred.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file — all computation in context. failedCheck find() is a simple array operation, not a hot path.

8.1.note: Fixed: text-[10px] → text-caption on summary grid, compliance section header, loading/error messages, check rows, result banner. text-[11px] → text-caption on idle message. text-[9px] → text-nano on mode badge, compliance PASS/FAIL badge, and check value columns.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Spinner from shared primitives. Summary uses div grid — acceptable pattern for a display grid.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare <input>. Interactive divs: none — all interactive elements are Button components. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify at minW=4, minH=3 — compliance check list must scroll if many checks.

l8.notes: All L8.1 violations fixed (three text-[9px] instances → text-nano).

keepSeparate.rationale: Preview and compliance is a distinct phase in the order workflow. Keeping it separate lets the user see both the form and the compliance result simultaneously — critical for the review-before-submit UX.

relationships.notes: Renders content driven by orderState from book-order-form (idle→preview). Also receives canExecute from auth context.

dataContract.notes: Compliance check via usePreTradeCheck() REST mutation triggered on handlePreview. Order submission via usePlaceOrder() REST mutation on handleSubmit. Both mutations live in book-data-context.

gaps: Compliance check only runs for execute mode — record_only skips compliance entirely
DeFi-specific compliance checks (e.g., slippage tolerance, liquidity depth) not yet in pre-trade check response
complianceUnavailable path allows submission with caution — production risk if compliance service is down
coverage.notes: Universal compliance widget. Compliance check API response shape (BookPreTradeCheckResponse) is mock-driven — production shape may differ.

knownIssues.note: book-data-context.tsx imports MOCK_TRADES from lib/mocks/fixtures/book-trades and merges it with ledger trades. Reference trade data should eventually move to lib/config/ or a proper seed file.
book-data-context.tsx handleSubmit passes algo_type: null for non-DeFi orders — CeFi algo not forwarded to placeMockOrder. Pre-existing bug in context file.

findings.description: book-preview-compliance-widget.tsx — text-[10px] on summary grid, compliance rows, result banner, loading message, amber warning; text-[11px] on idle message; text-[9px] on three badge/value locations
findings.fix: text-[10px] and text-[11px] replaced with text-caption throughout. Three text-[9px] instances replaced with text-nano.

findings.description: book-preview-compliance-widget.tsx:59 — text-[9px] on mode Badge (EXECUTE/RECORD ONLY)
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (maps to --text-nano: 0.5625rem / 9px from @theme).

findings.description: book-preview-compliance-widget.tsx:158 — text-[9px] on compliance PASS/FAIL Badge
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (maps to --text-nano: 0.5625rem / 9px from @theme).

findings.description: book-preview-compliance-widget.tsx:166 — text-[9px] on compliance check value columns (limit/current/proposed)
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (maps to --text-nano: 0.5625rem / 9px from @theme).

findings.description: book-preview-compliance-widget.tsx — ~25 user-visible strings. No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
